author: ANDREY V.
pros: Making an ever growing database based software would have been much harder and more costly without using Softr. The ease of use after initial set up makes it a breeze to expand my database and visually is highly appealing and functions great across desktop and mobile.
cons: Initial setup takes some time and learning, but once it is up and running it is very smooth and straightforward.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Extremely easy to use and very intuitive
description: Easy internal tool development to improve business efficiencies whilst minimising technical effort required to implement and maintain tools.
author: Justin S.
pros: The application is extremely easy to use and very intuitive. The features are pretty basic but for most situations that is all you need. There are many ways to expand the basic functionality by performing simple integrations with other best of breed tools. Customer support seems pretty fast for urgent issues. It is a no code builder, it is not a development platform requiring coding and too much thought process like most no code builders require.
cons: The user interface is pretty slow at times when querying Airtable data. It makes sense that there would be some speed issues given Softr performance relies on Airtable's performance, but some other SAAS providers don't seem to have such similar visible issues. Theme editing is very simple in terms of global settings for an application, alot of changes that should be made at the global level need to be made at the object level. Form building isn't the best experience but you can use other applications better suited to these tasks and nearly seamlessly integrate them with the Softr end user experience.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great to build, but bad support
author: Frank O.
pros: This company offers an excellent platform for developing a low-code, Minimum Viable Product (MVP), a basic marketplace, dynamic website, or portal.
cons: Their support services leave much to be desired. I have encountered technical issues that take weeks to resolve, frequently leaving me without updates for days. Furthermore, there was a critical instance where their entire platform was inaccessible during a crucial period of my business operations, resulting in my website being inaccessible. As a consequence, I missed out on opportunities for my customers to access my services.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Best free website maker available. Its is extremely easy to use and requires absolutly no coding, although you can code if you want too
author: Myles W.
pros: Softr is honestly the only website maker that is free for most functions and it is SUPER easy to use.
cons: There is some more advanced features that require some money.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I can't say Softr is the best website builder out there, but at the moment it's the one that best integrates with Airtable. For my use case with landing pages and Airtable and little visual and functional improvisations here and there, it works fine. Softr however recently raised money and I'm sure in the next few months it is going to improve a lot on the platform in terms of functionality and performance.
author: Pius E.
pros: The Simplicity of creating a website, deploying, and making updates in real-time. This is all very smooth. I use Softr for making landing pages that are sent to specific user groups in my Airtable. Softr working smoothly with Airtable makes this a piece of cake for me.
cons: Softr comes with pre-built blocks, and it's impossible to add additional functions to these blocks. You will find yourself improvising a lot with blocks to make up for its shortcomings in functionality. You may want to add a button within a "Hero block" to have two buttons leading to different parts of your website, but the block has one button and that's it! There's no way around it basically! It can be very frustrating but I guess that comes with most site-builders.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It's THE BEST No-Code Web/App Builder right now!
description: - I was able to build my site prototype and main website within a week after taking feedback from others. - Ticks all the necessary checkboxes.
author: Azeem T.
pros: - Product is sadistically simple to use. - The plug n' play content blocks available within the dashboard save a ton of time conceptualising a website experience. - Small thing, but they way CTA buttons just magically adjust to the size of text is a superstar feature. - if you're a marketer or entrepreneur, Softr helps you get your MVP up and running super fast. - Biggest of them all, it reduces dependency on the multiple teams required to build you a website.
cons: - Now that they've made desktop so easy, begs the question - How CAN THIS HAPPEN FOR MOBILE TOO? Maybe we're asking for too much but if Softr achieves this seamlessness for mobile devices, it would render so many other apps useless! - Maybe consider adding a place where we can source and customise illustrations as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I am a sales person by nature and hence always afraid of using coding. However, I have some ideas in mind that I need to test in the market. I approached several developers and problem with them is that either they quote you too high and don't give good support. I also approached some other no code platforms but the complexities and learning curve were huge. Then I discovered Softr. I am building two products using Softr and these are going to be my full product instead of just MVP because I don't have the fear of failure with Softr. Thanks Softr for making my life easy.
author: Kumar D.
pros: Ease of use, zero learning curve, excellent support, pocket friendly pricing,
cons: Nothing as of now. However, there are few things missing but these are in roadmap. So can wait for those without any issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall, Softr is doing the right things in adding features that the community is asking for. Every time I have had a question or needed help with something, the Softr team has been quick to assist with meaningful replies to solve the issue.
author: Joshua R.
pros: - The best feature is the live read and write to your Airtable database. - Very user friendly - Great customer support
cons: - the learning curve may be difficult for a newbie. - sometimes autosave gets confused when making updates to your app.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Im building internal tools for my team and also prototyping customer facing features.
author: Adam J.
pros: Softr is easier to use, more features, looks heaps better and is a fraction of the cost compared with other no-code Airtable development apps. Its insane
cons: its a hard one. but if I had to pick on anything, i would say their docs can use a little work.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: The product, team, and mission are going to leave a mark on the industry, and our company is better off because of it.

cons: Limited functionality in some parts of the tool, though that is to be expected from a block-based builder, and it continues to get better with constant updates and product launches.

description: Love using Softr to get a web-app up and running quickly. It's easy to connect with airtable where a good chunk of our backend sits. So far no complaints!
author: Ted B.
pros: - quick and easy app set up - test mvps with ease - allow internal and external stakeholders to provide feedback quickly - cheap vs. hiring a dev team to build from scratch
cons: - limited flexibility of the blocks themselves - not a ton of customization in the context of no-code - automation integration would be a huge plus
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Finan C.
pros: I like the no code application development It is simple to use and has amazing application development features.
cons: It all works with Softr and no serious issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I build 2 things with softr. - Course selling Platform - Host & Refugees matching platform
author: Cosmin M.
pros: You can build complex web apps in a matter of minutes. Flows that would generally take days/weeks to put together in order to make sure everything runs smoothly are now being done very fast. You could literally build a working prototype of anything very very fast. To give you a quick example, during the war between Russia and Ukraine we had to build an app that took care of Ukrainians that were planning to arrive in a different country. We managed to build an app that matched them with hosts in different countries in a day .
cons: Missing features. As good as the software gets some features are missing but there are workarounds around most of them. Also, if there is something critical, there is always an amazing support team ready to help.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use, great customer service
author: Phoebe L.
pros: I created an employee portal for my custom Airtable CRM in just a few hours. Super easy to use and intuitive. Excellent customer service went above and beyond when I got stuck. My staff can now easily edit the complete Airtable record from an easy to navigate front-end.
cons: I had trouble getting the user edit feature to work, but that was because I hadn't set permissions in the settings! The Softr support team helped me sort it out via chat.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: The software is great, even if sometimes it's a little hard to learn, you can count on the support team which is one of the best I've had the opportunity to work with. I highly recommend this software to all structures that wish to put front end on their Airtable database

pros: The Airtable integration is so smooth, and the UI of website is really clean.

author: clemence M.
pros: flexibility. will see soon more about it.

review_title: The best and most convenient tool for making tools
description: One of the most straightforward no-code solutions I have found that is tidy, professional, and fits my needs out of the many I have tested. Creating unique tools and procedures is a great way to avoid utilising several, pricey off-the-shelf tools. I don't need to write any code in order to build specialised user portals for my customers.
author: Atul K.
pros: In roughly the same amount of time it takes to watch a YouTube tutorial from another no-code provider, Softr gives you the ability to quickly put together an application. With many advanced use cases, they are quick to deploy, simple to use, and still have a good learning curve. In terms of the support I've received on Softr, despite using hundreds of SaaS platforms and products, none of them even come close. If you're working with Airtable and want to create a front-end connection to it, look no further than Softr.
cons: Several of the design components don't function properly. Several of the blocks I utilise for the desktop version are not particularly well optimised for mobile. There are certain functional and aesthetic restrictions, but in the little time I've been using it, they've incorporated regular updates and enhancements to make the user experience better.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Fast MVP development with Airtable (display & editing user information)
description: well, It saved my life as I need to get a new version of an existing app within a couple of weeks! And we did it! It's worth mentionning customer support (thanks [SENSITIVE CONTENT]!): (1) extremely reactive: within minutes, one hour at most, (2) and always very helpful, sometimes even hands on fixing issues I run into. Really thank u!!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Softr works hand in hand with Airtable. With these tools combined we build product that allows clients to submit requests online and follow their status in real time. It enable effortlessly to enable editing on part (or all) of the data in Airtable, and to manage access to that data.
cons: Softr works with predesigned blocks. So implementing your product will be very fast but a bit constrained by the existing design. You can however rely on custom code to add a few blocks or features as needed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best tool to get going in the no-code space
description: It is hands-down the easiest way to start and test a marketplace.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I absolutely love the way Softr can so easily take an Airtable sheet and turn it into a beautiful web app. The software is so cool, so easy to use, and I'm hooked. I absolutely love it.
cons: My only gripe is that the design of many of the app-design flows is basic from a UI standpoint, so either one of two things will happen. One, I will eventually switch to something more robust like a Webflow or Bubble (unlikely), or two, the Softr team will continue to upgrade their product and help with the design layouts. New blocks are being added all the time so I'm curious what will be in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The Perfect No Code Front End for your No Code Back End!
description: Overall this is the best No Code Front end website builder for your No Code Airtable Backend.
author: Alex S.
pros: If you remove the fact that it solves the number one problem I have with AirTable, and that my entire trucking company uses the website I built with Softr.io, the team at Softr.io has insanely rapid new feature/functionality deployment and borderline instant customer service response time.
cons: When I first started using Softr.io it was very limited on functionality, however the whole No Code movement was new and so there was lack of support and resources on all software. Even though there were other option to choose from, I'm glad I went with Softr.io because they have really started develop fantastic tools.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years
